_doc: sws_validFrom and sws_validUntil are non-RFC-7517 SWS-namespaced fields enforcing per-kid issuance windows. Verifiers MUST reject when payload.iat is outside [validFrom, validUntil]. Round-2 cryptography review (2026-04-28): a leaked old key during a rotation grace window could otherwise mint receipts dated after the rotation. Class 11 fix (2026-05-27): validUntil shortened from 2027-04-01 (1 year from issuance) to 2026-10-31 (~7 months). New kids generated by scripts/rotate-signing-key.js now use a 90-day window by default. Stephen must rotate the current kid BEFORE 2026-10-31 or all new signing will fail iat_after_kid_validUntil.
